sections.paragraph:
- Original: χρώς

- Transliteration: Chros

- Phonetic: khroce

- Definition:

1. the surface of the body, the skin

- Origin: probably akin to the base of G5530 through the idea of handling

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Probably akin to the base of G5530 through the idea of handling; the body (properly its surface or skin): - body.
